hotel_name: Khách sạn Mỹ Phương (Hotel My Phuong)

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: The room is fully carpeted, the walls are very dusty, and there is an unpleasant smell of cigarettes. It's a double room but there is only one bed.

reviews.title: Below average
reviews.negatives:
No hot water in showers.
No lift, had to drag luggage upstairs

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: There are cockroaches, the TV can't use YouTube, it's an old model, more suitable for older people than for younger ones. Soundproofing is needed, I pick a quiet room.

reviews.title: I check in with the bad wether  and kind of suck ….but the owner I guest was friendly and helpful
reviews.positives: Small room like prisoner kings but it was fine with me
reviews.negatives: Very quiet play and it’s seem like a ghost town

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Nice stay. Everything is good with affordable price
reviews.response:
Dear guest, we thank you alots. All the best and hope to see you guys again.
Your sincerely.

reviews.title: Nice
reviews.positives: Amazing view at night, friendly and comfortable atmosphere
reviews.negatives: I prefer a bigger room

reviews.title: Good within the price range.
reviews.text: The hotel is located in a new urban area, next to a Winmart and opposite a Bách Hoá Xanh. The receptionist in the morning and the one in the evening are extremely friendly. The soundproofing in the room is not very good, but the hotel has improved it by carpeting the floor, including the hallway, which helps reduce noise when guests are outside. There are many personal hygiene items provided in elegant paper bags. The towels are clean. There is a place to park motorbikes inside (many nearby hotels leave them outside on the sidewalk until evening).
reviews.response:
Dạ, Hotel Mỹ Phương xin cảm ơn và xin hẹn gặp lại ạ.
Thân chào

reviews.positives: Very friendly staff
reviews.negatives: Convenient

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The new hotel is quite clean and located near the ferry terminal.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Spacious room, clean, very close to the ferry station to go to Phu Quoc. Toiletries and everything you need available
reviews.negatives: The shower was rather warm than hot and the receptionist does not speak a word of English

reviews.title: Clean & quiet
reviews.text: I will take a night off to go to the port early in the morning. It takes about 10 minutes from the hotel to the port, and there is a VinMart next to the hotel.

reviews.title: Suelo de moqueta y cucaracha
reviews.positives: Alojamiento correcto para el precio
reviews.negatives: Había una cucaracha gigante debajo de la cama, deambulando de un lado a otro por la moqueta del suelo y los muebles. Pedí a la recepcionista que me ayudara para sacar el billete de ferry y me dijo que fuera al puerto a comprarlo

reviews.title: Hôtel basique mais pratique pour une nuit
reviews.positives: Hôtel pratique pour une nuit avant de prendre le bateau pour Phu Quoc. Une personne est présente à la réception 24h/24.
reviews.negatives: Très basique, fenêtre mais donnant sur les escaliers, donc pas d'aération, odeur de renfermé. L'eau chaude a mis beaucoup de temps à arriver.

reviews.title: Hệ thống thông gió nhà vệ sinh cực kỳ tệ
reviews.text: Mình ở phòng tầng trệt hệ thống thông gió tệ nên phòng ám mùi nhà vệ sinh cực kỳ nồng, mình đã mở cửa  phòng ngoài cho đến đêm để thông hơi nhưng hầu như cả đêm không thể ngủ được
reviews.response:
Chào bạn Quốc, hotel xin ghi nhận trách nhiệm và xin lỗi bạn về sự bất tiện trên. Cám ơn bạn đã thông tin. Chúng tôi sẽ khắc phục ngay. Mong bạn thông cảm nhé ạ.
Trân trọng.

reviews.negatives: In der näheren Umgebung keine Gastronomie oder Straßenküchen. Die AC war irreparabel defekt. Der Wirt bot Zimmerwechsel an, aber da für uns Ventilator ok ist, haben wir einen Rabatt ausgehandelt.

reviews.title: Plezierig hotel met vriendelijk personeel
reviews.positives: Fijne en ruime kamer. Aardige hotelbaas., die zijn uiterste best deed om te helpen waar nodig. Ook apart om in een hotel in een nieuwbouwwijk te zijn . Meer een woonbuurt, maar er waren voldoende restaurantjes en koffietentjes.
reviews.negatives: Kamer was goeddeels schoon, maar er lag vloerbedekking die losse plekken had waar gelukkig maar een keertje een kakkerlak uitkwam. Beter om tegelvloer te hebben. Zou ik doen als ik het voor het zeggen had.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Khi mới đến thấy khá sạch. Yên tĩnh. Có chỗ để xe máy đàng hoàng. Vị trí tương đối dễ tìm.
reviews.negatives: Kỳ nghỉ 3 ngày 2 đêm nhưng không thấy ai dọn phòng. Không thay khăn tắm. Thiếu khăn mặt cho khách như ở những khách sạn khác. Chăn mỏng và hẹp. Phòng 2 người nhưng chỉ có mỗi 1 ly uống nước. Độc nhất 1 giỏ rác trong nhà tắm. Không có tủ treo quần áo; thiếu bàn trang điểm và két sắt. Bố trí đèn và quạt không hợp lý.

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Chú rất nhiệt tình và vui vẻ, nệm cực kỳ êm luôn, phòng ấm cúng cực kỳ, có một điều đặc biệt và tinh tế là dù có máy nóng lạnh mặt trời, nhưng khách sạn sợ đêm khách đợi nước nóng lâu nên lấp cả thêm máy nóng lạnh bằng điện để các bạn có nước nóng tắm cho nhanh luôn.
reviews.negatives: Chưa có thang máy, nhưng cầu thang ngắn nên đi rất nhanh lên tầng trên.

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.title: Dirty and worn out room
reviews.positives: Close to the ferry
reviews.negatives: The room was extremely dirty. There were lots of hair in the bed and the blanket was dirty and obviously not changed/washed for a long time. Once opening the door we have furthermore seen 2 cockroaches hiding under the bed. We were told it is not possible to pay by credit card which is very strange for a hotel. The staff was not very friendly and supportive.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Bedrooms with out windows
reviews.negatives: No windows in the bedrooms

reviews.title: Dirty
reviews.positives: I got three 5 cm cockroaches as a bonus in a bathroom. When I was cheking out I saw another one in a hallway🤬
reviews.negatives: Explained above.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: It's very quiet place and near by express boat
reviews.negatives: There isn't any shops or restaurant, you can't see the sea and there is no one bus station. Taxi is expensive.

reviews.title: Can be better
reviews.positives: Market near hotel.
reviews.negatives: Unclean floors, reception don't speak in English, AC not working, room has no window, smell in room not good.

reviews.title: Holidays
reviews.positives: Nearby restaurants, jetty
reviews.negatives: No lift, bed so hard..

reviews.title: Ideally for one night if getting the ferry.
reviews.positives: Close to the port and easy to walk there. Nice clean room. Totally value for money.
reviews.negatives: Little way from restaurants and food if you arrive late.

reviews.title: Would recommend for anyone needing a basic place to stay before/after needing to get to the harbour
reviews.positives:
Very pleasantly surprised by this! 
- excellent value for money
- super friendly staff
- basic but clean room
- walking distance from the harbour
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Good place to stay in Rach Gia
